title: Sesi Native Webpage Generator
description: A comprehensive library for programmatically generating static websites, UI components, and layout assets using Sesi.
summary: This module provides a suite of functions for building modular web pages, including layout factories, interactive UI components like accordions and modals, and SEO metadata generation. It features robust error handling and input validation wrappers to ensure reliable site construction. The library also includes advanced capabilities such as concurrent page building using worker scripts and AI-assisted content generation. It is designed to streamline the creation of structured, responsive, and accessible web interfaces.

code_examples.description: Generating a simple webpage with a hero banner and SEO metadata.

key_rules: All page generation functions rely on the base 'create_header' and 'create_footer' templates for structural consistency.
The library uses 'assert_' prefixed functions to enforce strict input validation for strings, arrays, and numbers.
Concurrent builds require the use of 'concurrent_build', which spawns separate worker processes to handle asset generation in parallel.
AI-assisted functions like 'generatePageContent' include fallback mechanisms to ensure static content generation if the model call fails.
